jdbcService.sql: update ~cdm_instance_relations set target_id = ( select distinct e.cdm_instance_id from ~cdm_instance_external_ids e join ~cdm_instances i on i.id = e.cdm_instance_id where e.name = ~cdm_instance_relations.name and e.identifier = ~cdm_instance_relations.identifier and i.cdm_definition_id = ~cdm_instance_relations.cdm_definition_id ), modified = current_timestamp where target_id is null and active = true and stopped is null and exists ( select 1 from ~cdm_instance_external_ids e join ~cdm_instances i on i.id = e.cdm_instance_id where e.name = ~cdm_instance_relations.name and e.identifier = ~cdm_instance_relations.identifier and i.cdm_definition_id = ~cdm_instance_relations.cdm_definition_id ) and not exists ( select 1 from ~cdm_instance_external_ids e1 join ~cdm_instances i1 on i1.id = e1.cdm_instance_id join ~cdm_instance_external_ids e2 on e2.name = e1.name and e2.identifier = e1.identifier join ~cdm_instances i2 on i2.id = e2.cdm_instance_id where e1.name = ~cdm_instance_relations.name and e1.identifier = ~cdm_instance_relations.identifier and i1.cdm_definition_id = ~cdm_instance_relations.cdm_definition_id and i2.cdm_definition_id = ~cdm_instance_relations.cdm_definition_id and e1.cdm_instance_id <> e2.cdm_instance_id )
